content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Implement Min Heap". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
content.inputFormat: The input will be an array of integers, and the operations to be performed on the min heap.
content.outputFormat: The output will be the result of the operations performed on the min heap.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: To solve this problem, we can use a binary heap data structure. We will implement the min heap using an array and provide functions to insert, delete, and extract the minimum element.
solution.timeComplexity: O(log N) for insert, delete, and extract min operations

code.Python3:
class MinHeap:
            def __init__(self):
               self.arr = []

            # Function to insert an element into the min heap
            def insert(self, key):
               self.arr.append(key)
               index = len(self.arr) - 1

               while index != 0 and self.arr[(index - 1) // 2] > self.arr[index]:
                  self.arr[index], self.arr[(index - 1) // 2] = self.arr[(index - 1) // 2], self.arr[index]
                  index = (index - 1) // 2

            # Function to extract the minimum element from the min heap
            def extractMin(self):
               if len(self.arr) == 0:
                  return -1

               if len(self.arr) == 1:
                  min_val = self.arr[0]
                  self.arr.pop(0)
                  return min_val

               min_val = self.arr[0]
               self.arr[0] = self.arr[-1]
               self.arr.pop()
               self.heapify(0)
               return min_val

            # Function to heapify the min heap
            def heapify(self, index):
               smallest = index
               left = 2 * index + 1
               right = 2 * index + 2

               if left < len(self.arr) and self.arr[left] < self.arr[smallest]:
                  smallest = left

               if right < len(self.arr) and self.arr[right] < self.arr[smallest]:
                  smallest = right

               if smallest != index:
                  self.arr[index], self.arr[smallest] = self.arr[smallest], self.arr[index]
                  self.heapify(smallest)

         minHeap = MinHeap()
         minHeap.insert(10)
         minHeap.insert(20)
         minHeap.insert(5)
         minHeap.insert(15)
         minHeap.insert(30)
         minHeap.insert(25)

         print("Extracted Min: ", minHeap.extractMin())
